query: SELECT b.id, b.scheduleSlotId, b.status, b.sessionDate, b.sessionStartTime, b.sessionEndTime, p.id as programId, p.type FROM bookings b JOIN programs p ON b.programId = p.id WHERE p.type = 'private_lesson' AND b.status NOT IN ('cancelled') ORDER BY b.sessionDate DESC LIMIT 8;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user mUSTnZHSjH9Rc4V.ee5fccb85a53 --database kzZFsCRUb4iWMZR8LEwAKz --execute SELECT b.id, b.scheduleSlotId, b.status, b.sessionDate, b.sessionStartTime, b.sessionEndTime, p.id as programId, p.type FROM bookings b JOIN programs p ON b.programId = p.id WHERE p.type = 'private_lesson' AND b.status NOT IN ('cancelled') ORDER BY b.sessionDate DESC LIMIT 8;
